name: Flutterbat
description:
Flutterbat is a bat pony hybrid from My Little Pony: Friendship is Magic.

Usually a wild, territorial, and intimidating creature, this version of Flutterbat is what Flutterbat would act like, if Fluttershy could handle the wild, magical transformation into her batty version of the pegasus.

Limited to follow the guidelines.
creator: WolfHugsBat
